StmtSimple.StatementText:
WITH BasePrincipals AS ( SELECT p.Id AS PrincipalId, LoginName, ( CASE WHEN [User].Name IS NULL THEN UserGroup.Name ELSE [User].Name END ) AS Name, p.CreatedTime, ISNULL(A.LastLogin, [User].LastLogin) AS LastLogin FROM [Principal] p LEFT JOIN [User] ON [User].PrincipalId = p.Id OUTER APPLY ( SELECT TOP 1 LastLogin FROM [dbo].[PrincipalAuthLog] WHERE [User].PrincipalId = PrincipalId ORDER BY LastLogin DESC ) A LEFT JOIN UserGroup ON UserGroup.PrincipalId = p.Id WHERE p.DeletedTime IS NULL ), AllPrincipals AS ( SELECT PrincipalId AS Id, PrincipalId AS PId, LoginName, Name, CreatedTime, LastLogin FROM BasePrincipals
UNION ALL
SELECT child.UserGroupPrincipalId AS Id, parent.PId AS PId, parent.LoginName ,parent.Name, parent.CreatedTime, parent.LastLogin FROM PrincipalUserGroup child INNER JOIN Principal PG ON child.UserGroupPrincipalId = PG.Id AND PG.DeletedTime IS NULL INNER JOIN AllPrincipals parent ON parent.Id = child.PrincipalId AND child.DeletedBy IS NULL ) SELECT AllPrincipals.PId AS PrincipalId, AllPrincipals.LoginName, AllPrincipals.Name, AllPrincipals.CreatedTime ,AllPrincipals.LastLogin, AllPrincipals.Id AS PrivilegePrincipalId, Ro.AggregatedRoleId AS AggregatedRole ,Res.AggregatedResourceId AS AggregatedResource FROM AllPrincipals LEFT JOIN Privilege P ON P.PrincipalId = AllPrincipals.Id LEFT JOIN dbo.[Role] Ro ON P.RoleId = Ro.Id LEFT JOIN dbo.[Resource] Res ON P.ResourceId = Res.Id WHERE P.DeletedTime IS NULL ORDER BY AllPrincipals.PId

ScalarOperator.ScalarString: CASE WHEN [T-INF-Admittance].[dbo].[User].[Name] IS NULL THEN [T-INF-Admittance].[dbo].[UserGroup].[Name] ELSE [T-INF-Admittance].[dbo].[User].[Name] END
CASE WHEN [Expr1032]>(100) THEN (0) ELSE NULL END
